temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man with longish brown hair, a beard, and a red corduroy jacket over a plaid shirt leans menacingly into a doorway. His face is contorted in a sinister, wide-eyed smile as he speaks. A small cut is visible on his forehead. (Storyline: A threatening character is introduced. His menacing expression and dialogue suggest he is an antagonist who is trying to intimidate someone inside the house.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Creepy, menacing, and distorted. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to build tension.)
(00:04-00:05) A woman with dark hair, wearing a grey turtleneck and a blue cardigan, is shown in a state of extreme terror. Her eyes are wide with fear, and her mouth is agape as she stares at something off-screen. (Storyline: This cut reveals the person the man is threatening. Her terrified reaction confirms the danger he poses, escalating the scene's tension.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, suspenseful music continues.)
